title: US withdrawing 5,000 troops from Germany over Iran war spat
snippet: Pentagon confirms 5,000 US troop withdrawal from Germany over 6-12 months. Merz called US 'humiliated' by Iran, said no 'convincing strategy.' Trump: strong rejection. Withdrawal extends to threats against Italy, Spain. Widening US-Europe rift over Iran war conduct.
tag_reason: 펜타곤의 독일 주둔군 5,000명 철수 공식 확인은 5/1 신규 — 4/30 위협에서 공식화
